entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Peanut or groundnut germplasm used in breeding and conservation

entities.name: PURITY
entities.description: The genetic purity and health of seeds to avoid off-types

entities.name: VIABILITY
entities.description: The ability of seeds to remain alive and germinate during storage

entities.name: GENEBANK OPERATIONS
entities.description: The systematic process of maintaining and conserving crop germplasm

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The use of germplasm to develop better crop varieties

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic material of a crop stored for future use

entities.name: WELL DRAINED LIGHT SOILS
entities.description: Soil type recommended for raising peanut crops to maintain quality

entities.name: GENETIC INTEGRITY
entities.description: The maintenance of the original genetic makeup of an accession

entities.name: IDENTITY VERIFICATION
entities.description: The process of checking accessions during growth to remove off-type plants

entities.name: OPTIMUM MATURITY HARVESTING
entities.description: Harvesting the crop at the correct stage to ensure seed health

entities.name: STRONG SUNLIGHT
entities.description: Exposure to temperatures above 40 degrees Celsius

entities.name: MANUAL PICKING AND SHELLING
entities.description: The manual process of harvesting pods to avoid physical damage

entities.name: MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The level of water in seeds required for effective conservation

entities.name: MEDIUM TERM STORAGE
entities.description: Storage conditions at 4 degrees Celsius and 30% relative humidity

entities.name: LONG TERM STORAGE
entities.description: Storage conditions at -20 degrees Celsius

entities.name: SEED MONITORING
entities.description: Regular assessment of seed stock, viability, and health

entities.name: REGENERATION
entities.description: The process of renewing seed stocks when viability declines

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: PAPUA NEW GUINEA
entities.description: The environment where peanut breeding lines were evaluated

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: The characteristics and standards of the produced crop
